Uncompromised Logistics

Why Shippers Select VEER

Setting the standard for premium cargo distribution with tailormade solutions and end-to-end security.

International Courier

Seamless global shipping network covering over 220+ countries and territories.

Door Pickup

Hassle-free collection from your home, office or warehouse in Ahmedabad.

Air Cargo

Swift air freight services with priority airline cargo space bookings.

Express Delivery

Time-sensitive packages reach their global destinations via the fastest routes.

Business Shipping

Bespoke corporate logistics contracts with discounted freight rates.

Secure Packaging

Double-walled boxes, bubble wrap and professional crating for absolute safety.

Live Tracking

End-to-end updates from Ahmedabad dispatch directly to customer delivery.

Affordable Pricing

Competitive international rates with transparent pricing and no hidden costs.

Transit Insurance

Optional financial safety cover to secure high-value shipments against loss.

Fast Support

Dedicated account support team available via phone, email, and WhatsApp.

Global Operations

Designed to Handle Any Shipment

Explore All Services

International Courier

Reliable and fast door-to-door courier service for documents and parcels worldwide.

  • Customs clearance assistance
  • End-to-end real-time tracking
Learn More

Document Courier

Express and highly confidential handling for critical business documents and passports.

  • Priority shipping lane
  • Tamper-evident document pouches
Learn More

Express Delivery

Time-definite international deliveries with guaranteed speed and custom-fit routes.

  • Money-back delivery guarantee
  • 24/7 dedicated support desk
Learn More

Air Cargo

Global air freight services for heavy machinery, fragile parts, and bulk shipments.

  • Charter flights and consolidation options
  • Specialized oversized cargo handling
Learn More

Commercial Cargo

Tailored supply chain and freight forwarding services for commercial exporters.

  • Complete import/export documentation setup
  • Multi-modal transit capabilities
Learn More

Door Pickup Service

Convenient parcel pickup right from your home or warehouse across Ahmedabad.

  • Free scheduled pickup
  • Weighing and documentation at your doorstep
Learn More
Streamlined Journey

How Your Parcel Travels

A secure step-by-step transportation framework that handles logistics from pickup in Ahmedabad to recipient signing.

Step 1 details

Booking

Submit details online or call us. We employ state-of-the-art checkpoints to ensure your items are categorized, routed, and delivered strictly on schedule.

Full cargo insurance coverage applicable at this stage.
Global Network Map

Real-time Global Connectivity

Connecting local businesses in Gujarat directly with the global markets. Our active flights handle freight transits round the clock.

Global Transit Status

Hover over our global hubs to check estimated transit times and delivery performance.

Origin Hub

Ahmedabad (HQ)

VEER Logistics Central Hub

99.8% On-Time
Full Insurance
Client Endorsements

What Our Shippers Say

"VEER International has transformed our commercial exports. Their custom clearance in Ahmedabad is incredibly fast, and cargo reaches our clients in Germany within 4 days. Absolutely reliable!"

Rajesh Patel

Founder, Patel Exports Ltd.

"I sent critical medicines to my son studying in the USA. The temperature-sensitive parcel was delivered safely on time. The support team walked me through all the FDA documents."

Dr. Ananya Sharma

Individual Sender

"Our e-commerce boutique ships garments globally. VEER's automated tracking API integration makes it easy for our clients to track their packages. Excellent bulk rates too!"

Karan Mehta

CEO, Ahmedabad E-commerce Hub

"Their student discount is a lifesaver. I shipped two heavy suitcases of personal luggage from Ahmedabad to Canada. The price was very reasonable and it arrived without a scratch."

Sneha Vyas

Student, University of Toronto

Industry Knowledge

Understand the updated duty thresholds, digital filings, and compliance strategies for seamless international shipments.

June 18, 2026•4 min read

How to Securely Package Fragile Commercial Goods for Air Freight

A comprehensive guide on bubble wrapping, double-walled boxes, and customized wooden crating standard practices.

June 10, 2026•6 min read

Air Cargo vs Ocean Freight: Selecting the Ideal Mode for Your Business

Analyze the cost, speed, capacity, and environmental aspects to determine the best logistical choice for your supply chain.
